# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        string(name: 'DOCKER_REGISTRY_URL', defaultValue: 'myregistry.com', description: 'Docker registry URL')
        string(name: 'IMAGE_TAG', defaultValue: 'latest', description: 'Image tag')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build Docker image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    dockerImage = docker.build("${params.DOCKER_REGISTRY_URL}:${params.IMAGE_TAG}")
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Push Docker image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    docker.withRegistry('https://'+params.DOCKER_REGISTRY_URL, 'dockerHubCredentials') {
                        dockerImage.push(params.IMAGE_TAG)
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
